#import <Foundation/Foundation.h> // A minimal counter @interface Counter : NSObject @property (nonatomic) NSInteger count; - (void)increment; @end @implementation Counter - (void)increment { self.count += 1; /* bump */ } @end int main(int argc, const char *argv[]) { @autoreleasepool { Counter *c = [[Counter alloc] init]; [c increment]; NSLog(@"count = %ld", (long)c.count); } return 0; }
